overview: Kingsberg Medical provides growth hormone and testosterone replacement therapies. Patients begin with blood testing and diagnostic evaluation; if hormone deficiency is confirmed, they receive individualized treatment prescriptions.
highlights: Blood testing and physical exams scheduled locally near home or office
Multiple growth hormone and testosterone medications available
Sermorelin therapy available as a lower-cost alternative
targetAudience: Men and women over 35 experiencing age-related symptoms of hormone deficiency, particularly low energy, weight gain, muscle loss, or sexual performance issues.
